heading: Cloud Provider Regions
body:
| Region Name | AWS Region     |
| ----------- | -------------- |
| Paris       | eu-west-3      |
| Zurich      | eu-central-2   |
| Milan       | eu-south-1     |
| Spain       | eu-south-2     |
| UAE         | me-central-1   |
| Bahrain     | me-south-1     |
| Cape Town   | af-south-1     |
| Hong Kong   | ap-east-1      |
| Jakarta     | ap-southeast-3 |
| Melbourne   | ap-south-4     |
| Hyderabad   | ap-south-2     |
